pkgmetadata.longdescription: Gwyddion is a modular program for SPM data analysis. The 3.x series is an upstream rewrite targeting GTK+ 3, still marked unstable by upstream. It co-installs with the 2.x series (sci-visualization/gwyddion) since the binary is renamed to gwyddion3 and all libraries have a 3 suffix.

use.flag: Enable FITS image import via sci-libs/cfitsio
Enable the pygwy Python 3 scripting module
Enable WebP image export via media-libs/libwebp
